paragraphs.title: Modelos de ML
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Ejemplo de modelos ML disponibles
// Linear Regression, Random Forest, KMeans
import org.apache.spark.ml.regression.LinearRegression
import org.apache.spark.ml.classification.RandomForestClassifier
import org.apache.spark.ml.feature.VectorAssembler
import org.apache.spark.ml.clustering.KMeans

println("Librerias ML cargadas")

paragraphs.title: Grafos - Nodos Criticos
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Nodos criticos del grafo de rutas
val criticalNodes = spark.table("logistica.graph_critical_nodes")
criticalNodes.show(20, false)

paragraphs.title: Grafos - Metricas
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Metricas del grafo
val graphMetrics = spark.table("logistica.graph_route_hops")
graphMetrics.show(20, false)

paragraphs.title: Facts Operativos
paragraphs.text:
%spark
// Hechos operativos de clima
val weatherOps = spark.table("logistica.fact_weather_operational")
weatherOps.show(20, false)
